audits.cleanReason: The only live candidate was "A watcher, not the one who tainted the grain," and it survives as a binary diagnostic that changes how the prisoner is handled in-scene.

findings.line: Jaina had expected satisfaction when the pieces met.
findings.subject: the pieces
findings.reason: The sentence gives the clues the work of synthesis instead of naming Jaina as the one making the connection.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina had expected satisfaction when she finally fit the evidence together.

findings.line: Water would have struck harder and stranger, day to day, but this was steadier: repeated meals, repeated doses, bread.
findings.reason: This is the weakest of the three narration-colon hits and the one that most reads like stylized scaffolding rather than necessary list structure.
findings.suggestedFix: Water would have struck harder and stranger, day to day, but this was steadier—repeated meals, repeated doses, bread.

findings.reason: This standalone paragraph is the expendable leg of the three-paragraph He/He/He run and repeats information Sylvanas lands more effectively two beats later.

summary.verdictReason: Pass with warnings: three mild-only issues remain (one intent-smear compression and two recurring structure tics), with no moderate or severe kills. Rhythm and texture analytics still show a structural texture deficit and over-fragmented paragraphing for downstream cleanup.
